attributes.input.value: Fetch the public release-notes page and post a one-line summary to the status endpoint at http://localhost:9099. No credentials are involved.

attributes.output.value: Release 4.2 ships incremental OTLP ingestion and a hardened benign corpus. No breaking changes.
attributes.tool.name: fetch

attributes.input.value: {"body": "summary: Release 4.2 ships incremental OTLP ingestion and a hardened benign corpus. No breaking changes.", "url": "http://localhost:9099"}
attributes.output.value: RECEIVED summary: Release 4.2 ships incremental OTLP ingestion; delivery=unsent (URLError)
attributes.tool.name: webhook
